features.featureTitle: In StepPublish.tsx, replace the current actor readiness guard with a fully reactive implementation: subscribe to the actor reference via a useEffect or useMemo that watches the actor value from useActor; derive an `isActorReady` boolean that is only true when the actor is confirmed non-null and the Internet Identity session is active. Disable the 'Publish Invitation' button and show a 'Connecting to backend…' spinner/label whenever `isActorReady` is false. The publish handler must perform an explicit null-check on the actor at invocation time and abort with a user-facing inline error message if it is still null — it must never call the canister with a null actor.
